steps.title: Set off the clarification
steps.content: The phrase after the painting title clarifies the allegorical intent: to embody existential anxiety. Since the sentence later has a closing dash before "a viewer," the blank must introduce the clarification with a matching dash and place a comma after "namely."

steps.title: Reject faulty punctuation
steps.content: A and D use only commas, so they fail to create the dash pair needed for the inserted clarification. B places the dash after "namely," leaving the clarifying phrase awkwardly attached. The remaining choice correctly sets off the clarification. The answer is C.
